FILE(S): Patient and hospital 

SOURCE: AHCAH facility-submitted data 

VALUES: 23DEC2020 forward 

COMMENT: Formatted as MMDDYY10. in SAS 
 The data submission period represents the data submission for the previous month or wee. Data 
submissions are due to CMS by midnight of Wednesday for the previous week or month; therefore, 
submission dates may be a few days after the last day of the week or month.
